description_long: This object depicts a male maintenance worker dressed in a green uniform with yellow reflective stripes on the arms, chest, and legs. He is wearing a yellow hard hat and sturdy brown work boots, with the uniform featuring two chest pockets and a buttoned front. The figure's hands are exposed and colored white, and his facial features are neutral and unadorned. The uniform is form-fitting and appears to be a single-piece coverall, designed for visibility and safety in urban environments. The worker's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms resting naturally at his sides. No visible tools, badges, or additional accessories are present on the uniform.
description: A male maintenance worker in a green coverall with yellow reflective stripes, yellow hard hat, and brown work boots, standing upright with arms at his sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green uniform with yellow stripes, yellow hard hat, chest pockets, and brown boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hard hat, uniform fit, and reflective stripes on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the green uniform, yellow stripes, and the back of the hard hat and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the hard hat, uniform, and reflective stripes similar to the left side.
attribute_uniform_type: green industrial coverall with yellow reflective stripes and chest pockets
